title: omikuji
description: Adds omikuji, fortunes given out for offerings at shrines and temples in Japan - with unpredictable effects!
body:
Adds omikuji: random fortunes with special effects!
--- Adds: - Omikuji - randomized fortunes that can be opened to reveal poetry and a special effect - Omikuji box - a box that emits a random omikuji when given an offering (e.g. an apple) > Note: The Omikuji Box is not currently craftable ---
